title: 建筑空间场景图
description: A dynamic anime illustration of a girl with spiky {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair tied in a high ponytail with a black bow, striking teal eyes, and a {argument name="outfit style" default="dark purple
prompt_raw: A dynamic anime illustration of a girl with spiky {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair tied in a high ponytail with a black bow, striking teal eyes, and a {argument name="outfit style" default="dark purple and black magical uniform with gold trim and diamond gems"}. She is in an intense crouching superhero landing pose, one hand pressed to the ground and the other raised, casting {argument name="magic color" default="glowing purple"} magic circles. She is shattering through a glass barrier, with sharp, jagged glass shards flying outward toward the viewer. Through the broken frame behind her, a {argument name="background scene" default="stylized silhouette of a gothic city with tall spires against a vibrant purple and orange sunset sky"} is visible. The artwork features {argument name="art style" default="sharp angles, high contrast cel-shading, and vibrant colors"}.
prompt_preview: A dynamic anime illustration of a girl with spiky {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair tied in a high ponytail with a black bow, striking teal eyes, and a {argument name="outfit style" default="dark purple
prompt_display_cn:
案例「hair color」属于建筑/空间。这是一张建筑/空间类案例，重点在空间结构、材质、光影、环境氛围和设计概念。适合改成建筑概念图、室内设计、展厅、商业空间、民宿或未来城市视觉。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A dynamic anime 插画 of a girl with spiky 【hair color：blonde】 hair tied in a high ponytail with a black bow, striking teal eyes, and a 【outfit 风格：dark purple and black magical uniform with gold trim and diamond gems】. She is in an intense crouching superhero landing pose, one hand pressed to the ground and the other raised, casting 【magic color：glowing purple】 magic circles. She is shattering through a glass barrier, with sharp, jagged glass shards flying outward toward the viewer. Through the broken frame behind her, a 【背景 scene：stylized silhouette of a gothic city with tall spires against a vibrant purple and orange sunset sky】 is visible. The artwork features 【art 风格：sharp angles, high contrast cel-shading, and vibrant colors】.
prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【空间/建筑名称】的建筑空间视觉图。

空间类型：
这是一个【空间类型】，位于【环境/地点】，服务于【使用人群/功能】。

设计概念：
核心设计理念是【设计概念】，整体气质为【空间气质】。

空间元素：
画面中包含【主要结构】、【材质】、【家具/装置】、【景观/自然元素】等内容。

光影与氛围：
采用【时间/光线】，氛围为【氛围关键词】，色彩为【主色调】。

镜头构图：
使用【镜头视角】，突出空间纵深、尺度和材质细节。

输出要求：
画面高质量，像建筑表现图或空间设计提案，比例为【画面比例】。
